sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_empty_array (id Int32, values Array(Int64));
INSERT INTO test_empty_array VALUES (1, emptyArrayInt64()), (2, [1, 2, 3]), (3, emptyArrayInt64());
UPDATE test_empty_array SET values = emptyArrayInt64() WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, values FROM test_empty_array WHERE values = emptyArrayInt64();
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_empty_array WHERE values != emptyArrayInt64();
